text: T-015 research. Read tasks/T-015/BRIEF.md. Produce tasks/T-015/LANDSCAPE.md: has anyone built a voice/pedal-controlled automated MULTI-TAKE vocal recorder? List reusable OPEN-SOURCE pieces — audio capture (sounddevice/PortAudio, AVAudioEngine), take/comp management, punch-in, lyric→timecode forced alignment (Montreal Forced Aligner / whisperX), STT command parsing. Conclude what to BORROW vs BUILD. Commit + warroom-say.
